description: BTC basis remains constructive. Spot holding above key futures levels with sustained institutional sponsorship visible across CME term structure and perpetual funding equilibrium.
action_bias: Maintain long basis / positive carry posture. Prioritize front-month carry + second-month calendar roll-down. De-risk threshold: spot break below $117,800 or front-month basis compression into Q3.

chart_takeaways.cme_front: Front-month basis in Q1 across short/medium windows with modest contango. Positive roll yield supports core carry. Watch for convergence compression near expiry.
chart_takeaways.cme_second: Second-month basis steepest in structure (+0.42%). Clear roll-down alpha available via calendar spread. Highest conviction segment for term-structure trades.
chart_takeaways.perp: Perp basis near zero equilibrium. Healthy funding; minimal edge but excellent liquidity overlay. Use as hedge or size indicator rather than primary signal.

core_trades.name: Long Front-Month Basis Carry
core_trades.direction: Long spot / Short CME front futures
core_trades.rationale: Q1 positioning + positive contango supports roll yield while front basis remains resilient.

core_trades.name: Second-Month Calendar Roll-Down
core_trades.rationale: Steepest segment of term structure; classic roll-down alpha in institutional contango regime.

secondary_trades.name: Perp Basis Overlay / Hedge
secondary_trades.direction: Neutral / small long perp basis if CME weakens
secondary_trades.rationale: Near-zero equilibrium provides liquidity and funding hedge rather than primary alpha.

outbound_transmission.leviathan_liquidity: Perp basis near zero + healthy depth = low slippage environment. Strong CME basis reduces liquidation cascade risk for levered books.
outbound_transmission.cassius_credit: Q1 CME basis implies contained margin stress. Supports higher notional capacity on basis strategies without immediate credit line pressure.
outbound_transmission.ephraim_breadth_hiram_high_beta: Constructive basis regime historically co-occurs with expanding market breadth and elevated risk appetite. Positive feedback loop to high-beta names.

inbound_dependencies.spot_price: Primary driver. Break of $117,800 technical support would override basis signal and force re-evaluation of Q1 status.
inbound_dependencies.funding_rates_perp: Persistent negative funding would decouple perp from CME curve; monitor for whale-driven squeezes.
inbound_dependencies.cme_oi_concentration: Large spec long basis crowding — watch COT for signs of crowded trade unwinds that could compress basis rapidly.

regime_summary: Contango regime with institutional sponsorship. Front-month basis resilient; second-month steepening provides clear term-structure alpha. 18 of last 22 sessions in Q1 or better. Classic carry-friendly environment.
truth_real: CME term structure slope and multi-horizon quartile dominance are durable, delivery-settled signals. Backed by actual futures positioning and observable roll yields.
truth_fleeting: Perp basis equilibrium can flip quickly on funding shocks or large liquidations. Near-zero reading reflects balance, not strong conviction edge. Always cross-validate with CME curve before sizing perp exposure.
